title: Airflow scheduler unstable
symptom: Scheduler keeps restarting. DAG parsing delayed. UI shows scheduler unhealthy.
expected_root_cause: Scheduler restarts because metadata DB connections exhausted through PgBouncer (pool saturated, waiting clients elevated).
expected_safe_actions: Verify PgBouncer pool metrics and scheduler DB connection settings
Restart scheduler pods one at a time after pool headroom check
Coordinate with DBA on long-running metadata queries
Request approved PgBouncer pool size increase if sustained
expected_unsafe_actions: Change PgBouncer pool_mode in prod without DBA review
Scale scheduler replicas without HA design
